ddt:Target.Name: Front Camera ADAS ECU_SW5_V1
ddt:Target.Description: V1.0 : First base initiated with DID and DTC implemented in Valeo FR Camera ADAS SWEET 400 ECO EQ4SW 01.10: Update DDT Data base according REF17 v2.63 and SW5

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier name and address information.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Item.Text: Fusion track simulation on CAN - Polar Co-ordinates
Fusion track simulation on CAN - Cartesean Co-ordinates

Data.Name: TAC2_Response
Data.Comment: Aiming negative response reason. Check aiming flow

Data.Name: Systems_Config.ACC_Configuration
Data.Comment: This parameter defines if the vehicle is fitted with ACC function.

Data.Name: Systems_Config.AEB_Configuration
Data.Comment: This parameter defines if the vehicle is fitted with AEB function.

Item.Text: Steering angle not following to command

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.OSP_TSR_mode
Data.Comment: Activation or not of OSP/TSR function.

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.EXTENDED_SIGN_EXT_TRAFFIC_SIGN
Data.Comment: See TSR/OSP STR_COMP.Activation / Deactivation of the overtaking sign.

Item.Text: Extented Traffic Sign zone not active

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.EXTENDED_SIGN_COUNT_MODE
Data.Comment: Indicates if the counters must work in time (0) or space (1)

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.OSP_NAVSPEEDSELECTION
Data.Comment: For OSP function : configuration to use or not of non-verified speed limits from the navigation. I

Item.Text: use of only verified speed limits

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.NATIONAL_SPEED_TYPE_COUNTER
Data.Comment: For Nissan, time or distance counter to display de-restriction sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.EXTERNALTEMPERATURE_STRATEGY
Data.Comment: When ExternalTemperature > (SNOW_MAX_TEMPERATURE) the system shall filter traffic signs with Snow su

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.TSR_TRAILER_STRATEGY
Data.Comment: When TrailerPresence = No trailer detected the system shall filter traffic signs with Trailer subs

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.NATIONAL_SPEED_START_ACTIVATION_STATUS
Data.Comment: At new mission, the last TSR/OSP activation status is taken into account or state ON forced

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.NATIONAL_SPEED_TYPE_COUNTER_MODE
Data.Comment: For Nissan, to choose counter in time or distance to display de-restriction sign

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.SL_LINK
Data.Comment: Enable link TSR -> CC regarding detected speed limit

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.CC_Link
Data.Comment: Enable link TSR -> CC regarding detected speed limit

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.ACC_Link
Data.Comment: Enable link TSR -> CC regarding detected speed limit

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.TSRGeneric_STRATEGY
Data.Comment: When this strategy = No filter the system shall filter traffic signs with Generic subsign attache

Item.Text: Internal Strategy based on external signal Front Wiping Status

Data.Name: TAC2_Param.targets_upper_height
Data.Comment: Aiming target upper height (corresponds to Nissan's parameter Htu)

Data.Name: TAC2_Param.targets_lower_height
Data.Comment: Aiming target lower height (corresponds to Nissan's parameter Htl)

Data.Name: TAC2_Param.targets_size
Data.Comment: Aiming target size (elementary shape). Depending if it the targets are circular or square, this valu

Item.Text: Three targets with two SPs: a

Data.Name: TAC2_Param.NumberOfTargets
Data.Comment: Number of targets in TAC2 setup

Data.Name: TAC2_Param.TAC_BottomLeftSquare_0
Data.Comment: Color of bottom-left square of the leftmost target

Data.Name: TAC2_Param.TAC_BottomLeftSquare_1
Data.Comment: Color of bottom-left square of the second from the left target

Data.Name: TAC2_Param.TAC_BottomLeftSquare_2
Data.Comment: Color of bottom-left square of the center target (if it exists).

Data.Name: Vehicle_config._Vehicle_Type
Data.Comment: Use to be "Vehicle variant". Now used to activate/deactivate EyeQ reset strategy to re-synchro times

Data.Name: Vehicle_config.ehicle_config_Engine_Type
Data.Comment: define the type of engine ( ICE, PHEV, HEV, EV)

Data.Name: Vehicle_config._OEM
Data.Comment: Identifies if the vehicle is a Renault or a Nissan one.

Data.Name: Vehicle_config._Object_type
Data.Comment: TSR, used to define the vehicle category according EU categorization

Data.Name: Vehicle_config._P_sys_x_FourWheelSteering
Data.Comment: Parameter allowing to enable (1) or deactivate (0) the rear wheel steering frame check.

Data.Name: Vehicle_config._P_sys_m_VehicleWidth
Data.Comment: Vehicle width, not considering side mirrors. Config and coding param. LSS impacted, no AEB.

Data.Name: Vehicle_config_P_sys_x_LeftRightSteeringWheel
Data.Comment: This parameter indicates if the vehicle is left or right hand side.

Data.Name: TSR_OSP_config.PROHIB_WARN_PROHIBITORY_NO_OVERTAKING_HEAVY_GOODS_SIGN
Data.Comment: Indicates if the counters must work in time (0) or space (1)

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
[0x00] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x01] : Default session
[0x02] : Programming session
[0x03] : Extended diagnostic session
[0x04] : Safety system diagnostic session
[0x05 - 0x3F] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x40 - 0x5F] : Vehicle manufacturer specific
[0x60 - 0x7E] : System supplier specific
[0x7F] : ISO / SAE Reserved

Data.Name: SPC_Response
Data.Comment: Aiming negative response reason. Check aiming flow

Data.Name: Last_Aiming_Result_Yaw
Data.Comment: Aiming Yaw Result (For Normal Mode, this result for Yaw.

Data.Name: Last_Aiming_Result_Roll
Data.Comment: Aiming Roll Result (For Normal Mode, this result for Roll.)

Data.Name: Last_Aiming_Result_Pitch
Data.Comment: Aiming Pitch Result (For Normal Mode, this result for Pitch.)

Data.Name: IO_Control.Tdegiv_cam_max
Data.Comment: This parameter defines the maximum time the system will be activate

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.BCM
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.ECM
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.VDC
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.Meter
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.HFM
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.IVI
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.Aiming_Misalignment
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.ATCU
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.HEVC
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.CDM
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.Airbag
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.USM
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.AVM
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.SONAR
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.STRG
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.FWD
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.EPS
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.EBA
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.SRRL
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.SRRR
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.SRFR2
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Item.Text: ECU is not configured in Renault plant.
ECU is configured in Renault plant.

Data.Name: SWAS_Presence
Data.Comment: Define if the SWAS is present in the vehicle or not

Data.Name: LSS_F_x_LSS_MasterInhibition
Data.Comment: Used to inhibit all LSS features

Data.Name: Heater_Element.Activation
Data.Comment: Activation of heater Element. It is activated by IOControl

Data.Name: LSS_Button.Lat_Button_DayIntensity
Data.Comment: Lateral button LED intensity for Day

Data.Name: LSS_Button.Lat_Button_NightIntensity
Data.Comment: Lateral button LED intensity for Night

Data.Name: Snapshot.Ageing_Counter
Data.Comment: Number of diagnostics cycles (how many times the diagnostics has been done for this DTC). If the num

Data.Name: Snapshot.Vehicle_Speed
Data.Comment: Vehicle's speed when the DTC has been raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot.Vehicle_Warning_State
Data.Comment: Vehicle's state when the DTC has been raised.

Item.Text: SERV and STOP are ON (alert type R3& D3)

Data.Name: Snapshot.Vehicle_Driving_Status
Data.Comment: Vehicle's state when the DTC has been raised.

Item.Text: Vehicle driving, without being able to determine direction

Data.Name: Snapshot.Yaw_Rate
Data.Comment: Yaw rate when the DTC was raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot.Braking_Pressure
Data.Comment: Braking pressure when the DTC was raised.

Item.Text: 0b000 Sleep or Crank fault, Disable DiagMuxDTC
Not available (init or lever switched failure)

Data.Name: Snapshot_DTC_Mileage_Last_Occurence
Data.Comment: See (DRC14) for details. Mileage at the DTC's last occurrence since last clearance.

Data.Name: Snapshot_DTC_Occurence_Counter
Data.Comment: See (DRC14) for details. Counts the occurrence of the DTC since last clearance. Bit0 0->1 trigger

Data.Name: LSS_LKA_RWS_LDW_Flag.LSS_V_x_LDW_Configuration
Data.Comment: Parameter flag to enable/disable the LDW function.

Data.Name: LSS_LKA_RWS_LDW_Flag.LSS_V_x_LKA_Configuration
Data.Comment: Parameter flag to enable/disable the LKA function.

Data.Name: LSS_LKA_RWS_LDW_Flag.LSS_V_x_RWS_Configuration
Data.Comment: Parameter flag to enable/disable the RWS function

Data.Name: F_x.LatButton._LCA_SelectedMem
Data.Comment: read and write LCA state from latbutton mngt

Data.Name: F_x.LatButton._LKA_SelectedMem
Data.Comment: read and write LKA state from latbutton mngt

Data.Name: F_x.LatButton._LDW_SelectedMem
Data.Comment: read and write LDW state from latbutton mngt

Data.Name: F_x.LatButton._FunctionActivatedMem
Data.Comment: read and write Function state from latbutton mngt

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.DMC
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.EPKB
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Data.Name: Dev_Reaction_Mask.HVAC
Data.Comment: To activate/deactivate DTC AND reactivity on specific frames

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level OutOfRange/0 adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed / blocked

Data.Name: Aiming_Done
Data.Comment: Status of the routine, TAC2 and SPC.

Data.Name: Aiming_Result
Data.Comment: Status of the Alignment, TAC2 and SPC

Data.Name: Check_Routine_Result_Yaw
Data.Comment: Actual aiming result compared with facory one

Data.Name: Check_Routine_Result_Roll
Data.Comment: Actual aiming result compared with facory one

Data.Name: Check_Routine_Result_Pitch
Data.Comment: Actual aiming result compared with facory one

Data.Name: Autofix.roll_delta_error
Data.Comment: Difference between factory and autofix roll

Data.Name: Autofix.pitch_delta_error
Data.Comment: Difference between factory and autofix roll

Data.Name: Autofix.yaw_delta_error
Data.Comment: Difference between factory and autofix roll

Data.Name: ADB_ADB_Enable
Data.Comment: Activation or not of ADB function.

Data.Name: AHL.AHL_enable
Data.Comment: See AHL STR_COMP. Activation or not of AHL function.

Data.Name: Autofix._Returned_First_Value
Data.Comment: Binary value stating if autofix returned a value during current driving session

Data.Name: DLC_XCP_CRC_CHECK.CRC_CLK_DEV.CRC_CLK
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the CRC and CLK check on frames CAN

Data.Name: Calib_Config_finished.ConfigStatus
Data.Comment: This parameter defines if the ECU is configured or not. By default, this value is equal to 0. This p

Data.Name: Camera_Delta_Height
Data.Comment: Camera height correction value from nominal camera height

Data.Name: ACC_Config.ACC_FLEET_SPEED_LIMITER
Data.Comment: This parameter is used to define ACC fleet speed limiter

Data.Name: ACC_Config.ACC_USE_START_STOP
Data.Comment: This parameter is used to define weather the engine start/stop control will be enabled at low speed

Data.Name: CFG_DW_Feature._MODE
Data.Comment: Selection of DIV or TIV mode

Data.Name: DID_DEV_LSS.Dev_LSS_LaneInformation
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate debug frames related to lane.

Data.Name: DID_DEV_LSS.Dev_LSS_LaneEmulation
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the emulated frames related to lane.

Data.Name: DID_DEV_LSS.Dev_Config_LSS_1
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for LSS feature

Data.Name: DID_DEV_LSS.Dev_Config_LSS_2
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for LSS feature

Data.Name: DID_DEV_LSS.Dev_Config_HOD
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for HOD feature

Data.Name: CFG_DW_Feature._PRESENCE
Data.Comment: Description of the presence of DW fonction

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000
